name: get_meeting_by_id
description: Retrieve a single meeting record by its UUID, including attendees, linked client, and associated user. Used by the recap pipeline to load meeting context before generating a recap.

meeting_id.description: The UUID of the meeting to retrieve.

name: get_transcript_by_meeting_id
description: Retrieve the transcript record associated with a given meeting. Returns raw_text, processed_json, speaker_segments, confidence_score, and status. Used by the AI recap generation step to obtain transcribed content.

meeting_id.description: The UUID of the meeting whose transcript should be fetched.

name: create_recap
description: Insert a new recap record into the database. Called by the n8n AI pipeline immediately after GPT-4o generates recap content. Sets status to DRAFT by default.

meeting_id.description: UUID of the meeting this recap belongs to.

client_id.description: UUID of the client associated with the meeting.

generated_by_user_id.description: UUID of the user who triggered or owns this recap.

template_id.description: Optional UUID of the RecapTemplate to apply.

subject_line.description: Email subject line for the recap.

opening_paragraph.description: Opening paragraph of the recap email body.

decisions.description: Array of decision objects extracted from the meeting.

next_steps.description: Array of next-step objects with optional assignee and due date.

next_meeting_at.description: Optional ISO 8601 datetime for the next scheduled meeting.

quality_score.description: AI-assigned quality score (0–100) for the generated recap.

ai_model_version.description: The OpenAI model version string used for generation (e.g. gpt-4o-2024-11-20).

scheduled_send_at.description: Optional scheduled send time. If omitted, recap stays in DRAFT.

name: update_recap_status
description: Update the status field of an existing recap. Transitions: DRAFT → SCHEDULED → SENT → CONFIRMED | FAILED. Also updates sent_at when transitioning to SENT.

recap_id.description: UUID of the recap to update.

status.description: New status value for the recap.

name: get_pending_recaps
description: Fetch all DRAFT recaps for an organization that are older than a specified number of hours. Used by n8n scheduled jobs to identify stale recaps that need review or auto-escalation.

org_id.description: UUID of the organization to query.

hours_old.description: Return recaps created more than this many hours ago. E.g. 24 means recaps older than 24 hours.

name: mark_recap_confirmed
description: Mark a recap as CONFIRMED by the client, setting confirmed_at to the current timestamp. Triggered by the Postmark webhook handler when a client clicks the confirm link in the recap email.

recap_id.description: UUID of the recap being confirmed by the client.

name: get_org_integrations
description: Retrieve all integration records for a given organization, including status, type, and non-sensitive metadata. Used by the pipeline to determine which CRM and meeting platforms are active before routing actions.

org_id.description: UUID of the organization whose integrations to fetch.

name: update_action_items_crm_status
description: Bulk-update a list of ActionItem records with their CRM task ID after being successfully pushed to HubSpot or Salesforce. Sets status to PUSHED and records crm_pushed_at timestamp.

ids.description: Array of ActionItem UUIDs to update.

crm_task_id.description: The task ID returned by the CRM (HubSpot task ID or Salesforce task ID) to associate with these action items.

name: insert_audit_log
description: Insert a structured audit log entry for any create, update, delete, or send action performed by an agent or user. Required for compliance (Business plan) and internal tracing.

user_id.description: UUID of the user who performed the action. Null for system/agent actions.

entity_type.description: The Prisma model name of the affected entity (e.g. Recap, ActionItem, Integration).

entity_id.description: UUID of the specific record that was affected.

action.description: Description of the action performed (e.g. RECAP_SENT, STATUS_UPDATED, CRM_PUSH).

old_value.description: JSON snapshot of the entity state before the change.

new_value.description: JSON snapshot of the entity state after the change.

ip_address.description: IP address of the requester, if available.

name: get_orgs_with_active_users
description: Return all organizations that have at least one non-deleted user and are on PRO or BUSINESS plans. Used by n8n cron jobs for billing reconciliation and engagement monitoring across the platform.

name: get_this_weeks_stats
description: Return aggregated weekly statistics for an organization including: total meetings, completed recaps, confirmation rate, average quality score, and action items pushed to CRM. Used for weekly digest emails and dashboard widgets.

org_id.description: UUID of the organization to aggregate stats for.
